titles.text: まじかるキッズどろぴー

descriptions.text: Magical Kids Doropie is a side-scrolling action-adventure video game for the Family Computer, developed by Vic Tokai in 1990.

The year is 1999. The player was put in the middle of a war already lost. When the Akudama Empire, attacks the Earth with its army of robots. No conventional weapon in existence is efficient against this opponent. The robots are, however, totally vulnerable to magic. A hired mercenary, Kagemaru, summons the only non-sealed witch, Doropie, to stop the Akudama Empire's offence.

The Krion Conquest, known in Japan as Magical Kids Doropie (まじかるキッズどろぴー, Majikaru Kizzu Doropī), or more simply Magical Doropie (まじかるどろぴー), is a side-scrolling action-adventure video game for the Nintendo Entertainment System, developed by Vic Tokai in 1990. Later, Genki Mobile ported the game to Japanese mobile phones.
